description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in medieval-inspired armor, featuring metallic shoulder, arm, and chest plates over a fitted, dark undergarment. The armor is detailed with sculpted lines and appears to be made of metal, providing protection to the upper body, arms, and legs. The figure has a beard and wears his hair tied back in a bun, giving a rugged, battle-ready appearance. A sword is sheathed at his left hip, suggesting he is equipped for combat or patrol. The boots are sturdy and reach mid-calf, suitable for traversing urban or rugged environments. The overall look is that of a fantasy or historical warrior, blending practical protection with a distinctive, heroic style.
description: A bearded male adult in medieval-style armor with a sword at his hip, hair tied in a bun, and sturdy boots, ready for urban or fantasy combat.
description_view_0: Front view shows the armored chest, facial features, and both arms extended slightly outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the tied-back hair, and the sword sheathed at the hip.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back armor, the full length of the sword, and the hair bun.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the arm and leg armor, as well as the profile of the boots and face.
attribute_clothing_type: medieval-style armored suit with metal plates and fitted undergarment
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length hair tied in a bun
